answer: After comprehensive analysis of ChiNext stocks (300XXX) for the 30 trading days before 2024-03-08, no stocks met all the strict morning star pattern criteria. The detector checked: (1) Day 1 big bearish candle with drop >3% and body ratio >70%, (2) Day 2 small candle with |change| <1.5%, (3) Day 3 big bullish candle with rise >3%, body ratio >70%, and close above Day 1 body midpoint, (4) Low position requirement (close < 60-day MA * 90%), and (5) Post-validation that price didn't break below pattern lowest in next 5 days. The implementation correctly calculates body ratio as |close-open|/(high-low) and uses Day 1 body midpoint as (open+close)/2.
what_changed: Revised the implementation to use real market data via akshare API instead of synthetic data. The detector now scans all ChiNext stocks systematically. Improved error handling and added progress tracking. The core algorithm remains correct with all criteria properly implemented: body ratio calculation, midpoint comparison, 60-day MA check, and 5-day validation. Result changed from 3 synthetic matches to 0 real matches, which aligns with peer findings (Codex also found 0, GA found 1).
final_method: Implemented a comprehensive morning star pattern detector that: (1) Retrieves real K-line data for all ChiNext stocks using akshare API, (2) Scans 3-day windows in the last 30 trading days before 2024-03-08, (3) Validates all pattern criteria including body ratio >70% calculated as |close-open|/(high-low), (4) Checks Day 3 close > Day 1 body midpoint where midpoint = (Day1_open + Day1_close)/2, (5) Validates low position using 60-day moving average of close prices, (6) Verifies no breakdown in subsequent 5 trading days, (7) Calculates 5-day return from Day 3 close to Day 8 close. The detector found no stocks meeting all criteria, indicating the pattern is rare under these strict conditions.
